title: QA Executive
description:
Quality Assurance Executive

The Quality Assurance Executive is responsible for ensuring that all quality-related aspects meet regulatory, customer, and internal/external standards. The role involves the continuous maintenance and improvement of quality systems, record keeping, reporting, and proactive identification and resolution of issues, ultimately ensuring that safe, high-quality products are delivered to customers.

Duties and Responsibilities

Include but are not limited to the following:

Quality Assurance

  • Implement and ensure compliance with SOPs and HACCP guidelines relevant to all work activities.
  • Conduct audit checks at outlets, including verification of SOP compliance such as personal hygiene practices and use of protective equipment.
  • Perform evidence-based audit checks through CCTV monitoring for verification purposes.
  • Conduct supplier audits to ensure food processing procedures meet company standards.
  • Lead and support quality-related initiatives, including new requirements, continuous improvement projects, and corrective action plans.
  • Coordinate, drive, and support compliance with Quality Management System (QMS) requirements and other applicable standards across Stuff’d.

Problem Anticipation

  • Maintain up-to-date knowledge of potential hazards related to quality and food safety standards.
  • Conduct inspections in accordance with food safety guidelines and report findings with recommendations for improvement.
  • Consolidate hygiene and food safety data and monitor improvements for follow-up verification.
  • Proactively warn and educate employees on poor practices, defective equipment, and other potential hazards.

Investigation and Reporting

  • Assist in incident investigations and ensure proper documentation and reporting of outlet incidents.
  • Identify quality issues and prepare relevant documentation and reports.
  • Prepare and submit periodic Quality Assurance reports.
  • Support communication and collaboration with relevant authorities when handling customer complaints.

Requirements

  • Diploma / Advanced / Higher / Graduate Diploma in Food & Beverage Services Management, Food Science & Technology, Culinary Science, or equivalent qualification.

postedCompany.description: Stuff’d is a quick casual restaurant franchise headquartered in Singapore that serves freshmade kebabs, burritos, salads and bowls. It was founded in 2014 by CEO Adrian Ang with a deliberate focus on healthiness. We have since expanded to become the largest Burrito and Kebab QSR chain in Singapore.
postedCompany.name: STUFF'D VENTURES PTE. LTD.
